message:
test(fcp-raptorq): add batch 2 encoder, error, and OTI tests

Extend fcp-raptorq test coverage with additional tests:
- encode.rs: source ESI ordering, repair ESI starting at K', total
  symbol count consistency, EncodingDecision is_direct/is_chunked
  exclusivity, default config behavior, chunked reconstruction,
  zero repair ratio, debug format, transmission info constness
- error.rs: additional Display/Clone/Eq trait validation across
  more error variant combinations
- oti.rs: further ObjectTransmissionInformation construction and
  serialization edge cases

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
